user_agreement_content:
1. Definitions

Platform: The website videos-review.com. User: Any person registered on the Platform. Users are divided into "Clients" (individuals publishing reviews of goods/services) and "Companies" (representatives of legal entities responding to or publishing reviews about Clients). Content: Any materials (video, photo, text) posted by the User. Review: A User's opinion based on personal experience.

2. Rules of Platform Use

2.1. By posting Content, the User represents and warrants that they hold all necessary rights (including copyrights) to said Content and that its publication does not violate the rights of third parties. 2.2. The publication of knowingly false, commissioned, or fake Reviews is prohibited. The Platform reserves the right to remove such content upon receiving a corresponding notification. 2.3. The use of profanity, insults, threats, and the publication of third-party personal data without their explicit consent is prohibited, which is a violation of data protection laws (including GDPR). 2.4. Posting any advertisements is prohibited.

3. Intellectual Property

3.1. The User retains all rights to their Content. 3.2. By uploading Content, the User grants the Platform a royalty-free, non-exclusive, worldwide license to use, reproduce, modify, and publish this Content for the purposes of the Platform's operation and promotion.

4. Moderation and Disputes

4.1. The Platform reserves the right to moderate all Content. 4.2. The Platform is not liable for Content posted by Users until it receives official notification of its unlawful nature. Users can report violations through the dedicated complaint form on the Platform. 4.3. Upon receiving a notification, the Platform undertakes to take measures to remove or block the unlawful Content. 4.4. In case of a User's violation of this Agreement, the Platform has the right to temporarily or permanently block the User's account.

5. Limitation of Liability

5.1. The Platform is an information intermediary and only provides the technical means for exchanging opinions. All responsibility for the Content lies with the User who published it. 5.2. The Platform's liability cannot be limited or excluded in cases where it contradicts applicable law, such as in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence.

6. Dispute Resolution

6.1. All disputes shall be resolved through negotiations via the Platform's official email: support@videos-review.com. The claim review period is 30 days. 6.2. If a dispute cannot be resolved through negotiations: a) Disputes with Users who are consumers shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the court in accordance with the applicable consumer protection laws. b) Disputes with Users who are companies shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the court at the Platform's seat.
privacy_policy_content:
1. What Data We Collect

Data provided by you: Email address, password (in encrypted form), and any information that you voluntarily provide in your profile or in the published Content. Automatically collected data: IP address, browser type, operating system, cookies, and data about your interaction with the Platform.

2. How We Use Your Data

For authentication and management of your account. To send service notifications (e.g., about registration confirmation, password reset, or new comments). To ensure the security of the Platform and prevent fraud. To analyze and improve our service.

3. Transfer of Data to Third Parties

We do not sell or transfer your personal data to third parties, except for cases where: It is required by law (e.g., upon request from law enforcement agencies). For the protection of our rights and property.

4. Data Storage and Security

We take all necessary technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction. Your data is stored on secure servers.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal information. This can be done through your profile settings or by contacting customer support.
